T
Specialisation | Team & Organisational

Team & Organisational Coaching

Coaching one leader changes one leader. Building a coaching culture changes how a whole organisation works.

What you will learn to do

Coach teams as living systems, not collections of individuals

Embed coaching habits into everyday management

Improve feedback, accountability and psychological safety

Measure the impact of a coaching culture

Who this suits

  • Internal coaches and coaching champions
  • HR, learning and people leaders
  • Managers who want to lead through coaching

At a glance

  • Role
    Focus area within the Mastery Pathway
  • Format
    Online, one-to-one or in-house
  • Entry
    Suggested from Architect (Level 2)
  • Cost
    Follows the Pathway; organisations can request a proposal

How it fits the Mastery Pathway

A team focus suits the Architect level and above, and is often pursued by organisations training several people. Your credential and investment follow the level.

Request an Organisational ProposalSpeak to an Advisor

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
